violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. - Prep table in kitchen holding food around 43*F. Needs to be dailed to 41*F or below. If not able to do so, mintenance is needed. - Domestic refrigerator for salad dressings and condiments holding food temperature around 45*F. Needs to be dailed to 41*F or below. If not able to do so, mintenance is needed.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food prepared and packaged by a processing plant was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days after original package was opened. - Multiple working containers throughout kitchen and walk-in cooler were past 10 calendar days from date labeled on container. Discard food prepared and/or packaged by a processing plant not consumed after 10 calendar days.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. - All coolers and freezers in need of cleaning from food crumbs collecting at bottom of shevles. - Fans in walk-in cooler in need of cleaning.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as needed. - Filters under cooking hood in need of cleaning between professional cleanings. Collecting grease buildup.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors, walls, and ceiling in kitchen and back areas in need of spot cleaning where buildup is showing.
